2604.24339.title: See Further, Think Deeper: Advancing VLM's Reasoning Ability with Low-level Visual Cues and Reflection
2604.24339.paper_summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have benefited from Reinforcement Learning (RL) for enhanced reasoning. However, existing methods still face critical limitations, including the lack of low-level visual information and effective visual feedback. To address these problems, this paper proposes a unified multimodal interleaved reasoning framework \textbf{ForeSight}, which enables VLMs to \textbf{See Further} with low-level visual cues and \textbf{Think Deeper} with effective visual feedback. First, it introduces a set of low-level visual tools to integrate essential visual information into the reasoning chain, mitigating the neglect of fine-grained visual features. Second, a mask-based visual feedback mechanism is elaborated to incorporate visual reflection into the thinking process, enabling the model to dynamically re-examine and update its answers. Driven by RL, ForeSight learns to autonomously decide on tool invocation and answer verification, with the final answer accuracy as the reward signal. To evaluate the performance of the proposed framework, we construct a new dataset, Character and Grounding SalBench (CG-SalBench), based on the SalBench dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the ForeSight-7B model significantly outperforms other models with the same parameter scale, and even surpasses the current SOTA closed-source models on certain metrics.
2604.24339.paper_summary_zh: 最近在視覺-語言模型（VLMs）方面的進展受益於強化學習（RL）以增強推理能力。<lb/>然而，現有的方法仍然面臨關鍵的限制，包括缺乏低層次的視覺信息和有效的視覺反饋。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，本文提出了一個統一的多模態交錯推理框架 \textbf{ForeSight}，使 VLMs 能夠 \textbf{看得更遠}，利用低層次的視覺線索，並且 \textbf{思考得更深}，通過有效的視覺反饋。<lb/>首先，它引入了一組低層次的視覺工具，將基本的視覺信息整合到推理鏈中，減輕對細粒度視覺特徵的忽視。<lb/>其次，詳細闡述了一種基於遮罩的視覺反饋機制，以將視覺反思納入思考過程，使模型能夠動態重新檢查和更新其答案。<lb/>在 RL 的驅動下，ForeSight 學會自主決定工具調用和答案驗證，以最終答案的準確性作為獎勵信號。<lb/>為了評估所提框架的性能，我們基於 SalBench 數據集構建了一個新的數據集，字符和基礎定位 SalBench（CG-SalBench）。<lb/>實驗結果表明，ForeSight-7B 模型在相同參數規模下顯著超越其他模型，甚至在某些指標上超越當前的 SOTA 封閉源模型。
2604.24339.author: Zhiheng Wu et.al.
2604.24339.authors: Zhiheng Wu, Tong Wang, Shuning Wang, Naiming Liu, Yumeng Zhang
